name: mobile_tool
description: Send messages to User's mobile app. Use 'send_text' to send a soft text-message push notification (shows up as 'Agent messaged you' on her phone, plays a normal notification chime, and appears in the chat). Use 'initiate_voice_call' to ring her phone like a phone call ('Agent is calling...' with a strong ringtone) — only use this when the matter actually warrants interrupting her, since it bypasses do-not-disturb behavior at higher urgency levels. Both actions deliver via Expo push notifications to the device she registered with the app.

action.description: What to do: 'send_text' for a normal text message, 'initiate_voice_call' to ring her phone for a voice conversation.

message.description: The text message content (for send_text) or the opening line you want to say when she answers (for initiate_voice_call). Required for both actions.

user_id.description: The user to send to. Defaults to 'angela_wolfe'.

urgency.description: For initiate_voice_call only: how urgent the call is. 'low' and 'medium' show an in-app overlay she can decline; 'high' and 'critical' auto-answer when she has the app open. Defaults to 'medium'.

trigger_name.description: Optional short label describing why you're reaching out (e.g. 'check_in', 'urgent_news'). Defaults to 'nate_initiated'.
